title: The sv_interface test is not implemented
body:
This test is marked as NI since is generates compiler errors. The test is in ivtest/ivltests/sv_interface.v.

```
steve@icarus:~/icarus/eda/devel/verilog/ivtest> cat log/sv_interface-iverilog-stderr.log 
ivltests/sv_interface.v:119: syntax error
ivltests/sv_interface.v:1: Errors in port declarations.
ivltests/sv_interface.v:151: syntax error
ivltests/sv_interface.v:1: Errors in port declarations.
```
code_blocks:
steve@icarus:~/icarus/eda/devel/verilog/ivtest> cat log/sv_interface-iverilog-stderr.log 
ivltests/sv_interface.v:119: syntax error
ivltests/sv_interface.v:1: Errors in port declarations.
ivltests/sv_interface.v:151: syntax error
ivltests/sv_interface.v:1: Errors in port declarations.
